jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Mindtree
jsonLd.description:
Mindtree, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mindtree:
Mindtree is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindtree!
